_publications._publicationTitle: Proof of Concept for Genome Profiling of the Neurofibroma/Sarcoma Sequence in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: four DNA samples derived from formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded (FFPE) tissues were collected from a patient with MPNST-NF1-associated diagnosis
details: Successfully extracted DNA from four FFPE tissue samples (benign plexiform neurofibroma, primary MPNST tumor, lung metastasis, and skin metastasis) for whole exome sequencing analysis
